productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Olive Belt
description: In a simple braided style, this fabric belt from lino perros looks great with denim trousers and dresses. Length: 92 cm Made of fabric in a braided pattern with leather panels at the buckle and on the tail end for durability and style Tang clasp to customise Fit One fixed leather loop to hold the tail in place Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
